channel.title: Third-Party Risk on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Third-Party Risk on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Risk Management
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Risk Management" , "ISA/IEC 62443" , "NERC CIP" , "Risk Assessment" , "Governance" , "Supply Chain Risk" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT risk management for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn risk fundamentals, frameworks like ISA/IEC 62443 and NERC CIP, qualitative and quantitative assessments, risk treatments, governance artifacts, third-party risk, and change management.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Program Management and Oversight
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Audits" , "Security Awareness" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Third-Party Risk" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security program management and oversight for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn governance, risk management, third-party risk, compliance, audits, and security awareness.

item.title: Cybersecurity Readiness: Safeguarding Your Business Data
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Business Security" , "Data Protection" , "Risk Assessment" , "Information Security" , "Digital Safety" , "Data Privacy" , "Cyber Threats" , "Network Security" , "Vendor Risk Management"
item.description: Assess the cybersecurity readiness of companies before sharing sensitive information or doing business with them. Protect your data and stay secure!
